bash_commands.command: find /workspace/kubernetes--v1.32.0 -type f -name "*.go" | xargs grep -l "audit" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "_test.go" | grep -v "vendor" | head -100
find /workspace/kubernetes--v1.32.0/staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver -type f -name "*.go" | grep -i audit | grep -v "_test.go" | sort

find /workspace/kubernetes--v1.32.0/staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/log -type f -name "*.go" | sort && find /workspace/kubernetes--v1.32.0/staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/webhook -type f -name "*.go" | sort
find /workspace/kubernetes--v1.32.0 -type f -name "*.go" -path "*/audit/*" | grep -v "_test.go" | grep -v vendor | sort
find /workspace/kubernetes--v1.32.0/staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver -type f -name "*.go" | grep -v "_test.go" | grep -v vendor | xargs grep -l "audit\." 2>/dev/null | grep -v "audit/" | sort | head -30

  "text": "The Kubernetes API server audit logging system is implemented across several packages in the kubernetes/kubernetes repo (under staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver).\n\n**Audit Event Creation from Requests:**\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/request.go`: Core logic to construct audit.Event structs from HTTP requests and responses (NewEventFromRequest, LogRequestObject, LogResponseObject, LogResponseStatus).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/context.go`: Stores and retrieves the audit event in/from the request context (WithAuditContext, AuditEventFrom).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/format.go`: Serializes audit events for output.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/audit.go`: HTTP middleware (WithAudit) that wraps handlers to create/complete audit events per request.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/audit_init.go`: Initializes audit context for each request (WithAuditInit).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/authn_audit.go`: Records authentication failure events (WithFailedAuthenticationAudit).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/audit.go`: Injects audit annotations from admission handlers.\n\n**Audit Policy Evaluation:**\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/evaluator.go`: Defines the PolicyRuleEvaluator interface and RequestAuditConfig struct.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/checker.go`: Implements PolicyChecker / NewPolicyRuleEvaluator that evaluates rules per request.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/reader.go`: Loads audit policy from a file (LoadPolicyFromFile).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/util.go`: Utility helpers for policy evaluation.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/validation/validation.go`: Validates audit policy objects.\n\n**Audit Backend Dispatch (log file vs webhook):**\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/types.go`: Defines the Backend interface that all backends implement.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/union.go`: Multiplexes events to multiple backends (Union).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/log/backend.go`: File/stdout log backend implementation.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/webhook/webhook.go`: Webhook (HTTP POST) backend.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/buffered/buffered.go`: Buffered async wrapper around any backend.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/fake/fake.go`: In-memory fake backend for testing.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/audit.go`: Server options wiring — reads flags and constructs the final backend chain.\n\n**Audit Truncation for Large Bodies:**\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/truncate/truncate.go`: Wraps another backend and truncates oversized request/response objects before forwarding (truncateBackend, NewBackend).\n\n**Audit API Types:**\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/types.go`: Internal type definitions (Event, Policy, PolicyRule, etc.).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/helpers.go`: Helper functions for audit types.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/v1/types.go`: Versioned v1 API types.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/v1/generated.pb.go`: Protobuf-generated code for v1 types.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/v1/zz_generated.conversion.go`: Auto-generated conversion between internal and v1 types.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/install/install.go`: Installs audit API types into the scheme.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/scheme.go`: Audit-specific codec/scheme setup.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/metrics.go`: Audit event drop and error metrics.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/register.go` and `v1/register.go`: Group/version registration."
}

conversation_events.text:
# Kubernetes Audit Log Middleware and Backend

## Your Task

Find all Go source files in kubernetes/kubernetes that implement API server audit logging: the audit event creation from requests, the audit policy evaluation, the audit backend dispatch (log file vs webhook), and the audit truncation for large request/response bodies.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the platform domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/kubernetes--v1.32.0, sg-evals/client-go--v0.32.0, sg-evals/api--v0.32.0, sg-evals/etcd-io-etcd.


## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "SymbolName"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "FunctionName"}
  ],
  "text": "Narrative explanation of your findings, citing repos and file paths."
}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?
Now let me compile the comprehensive list of all relevant files. Let me also check for any other audit-related files outside of the audit directory:
Now I have a comprehensive picture. Let me create the answer.json:

The answer has been written to `/workspace/answer.json`. Here's a summary of what I found:

## Kubernetes API Server Audit Logging Files

### Audit Event Creation from Requests
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/request.go` — `NewEventFromRequest`, `LogRequestObject`, `LogResponseObject`
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/context.go` — stores/retrieves audit event per request context
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/format.go` — serializes events for output
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/audit.go` — HTTP middleware `WithAudit`
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/audit_init.go` — `WithAuditInit`
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/authn_audit.go` — authentication failure events
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/audit.go` — admission handler audit annotations

### Audit Policy Evaluation
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/evaluator.go` — `PolicyRuleEvaluator` interface
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/checker.go` — `NewPolicyRuleEvaluator`
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/reader.go` — `LoadPolicyFromFile`
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/util.go` — policy utilities
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/validation/validation.go` — policy validation

### Audit Backend Dispatch (log file vs webhook)
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/types.go` — `Backend` interface
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/union.go` — dispatch to multiple backends
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/log/backend.go` — file/stdout log backend
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/webhook/webhook.go` — HTTP webhook backend
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/buffered/buffered.go` — async buffered wrapper
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/audit.go` — server flag wiring

### Audit Truncation
- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/truncate/truncate.go` — truncates oversized request/response bodies before dispatch

  "text": "The Kubernetes API server audit logging system is implemented across several packages in the kubernetes/kubernetes repo (under staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver).\n\n**Audit Event Creation from Requests:**\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/request.go`: Core logic to construct audit.Event structs from HTTP requests and responses (NewEventFromRequest, LogRequestObject, LogResponseObject, LogResponseStatus).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/context.go`: Stores and retrieves the audit event in/from the request context (WithAuditContext, AuditEventFrom).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/format.go`: Serializes audit events for output.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/audit.go`: HTTP middleware (WithAudit) that wraps handlers to create/complete audit events per request.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/audit_init.go`: Initializes audit context for each request (WithAuditInit).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/authn_audit.go`: Records authentication failure events (WithFailedAuthenticationAudit).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/audit.go`: Injects audit annotations from admission handlers.\n\n**Audit Policy Evaluation:**\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/evaluator.go`: Defines the PolicyRuleEvaluator interface and RequestAuditConfig struct.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/checker.go`: Implements PolicyChecker / NewPolicyRuleEvaluator that evaluates rules per request.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/reader.go`: Loads audit policy from a file (LoadPolicyFromFile).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/util.go`: Utility helpers for policy evaluation.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/validation/validation.go`: Validates audit policy objects.\n\n**Audit Backend Dispatch (log file vs webhook):**\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/types.go`: Defines the Backend interface that all backends implement.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/union.go`: Multiplexes events to multiple backends (Union).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/log/backend.go`: File/stdout log backend implementation.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/webhook/webhook.go`: Webhook (HTTP POST) backend.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/buffered/buffered.go`: Buffered async wrapper around any backend.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/fake/fake.go`: In-memory fake backend for testing.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/audit.go`: Server options wiring — reads flags and constructs the final backend chain.\n\n**Audit Truncation for Large Bodies:**\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/truncate/truncate.go`: Wraps another backend and truncates oversized request/response objects before forwarding (truncateBackend, NewBackend).\n\n**Audit API Types:**\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/types.go`: Internal type definitions (Event, Policy, PolicyRule, etc.).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/helpers.go`: Helper functions for audit types.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/v1/types.go`: Versioned v1 API types.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/v1/generated.pb.go`: Protobuf-generated code for v1 types.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/v1/zz_generated.conversion.go`: Auto-generated conversion between internal and v1 types.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/install/install.go`: Installs audit API types into the scheme.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/scheme.go`: Audit-specific codec/scheme setup.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/metrics.go`: Audit event drop and error metrics.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/register.go` and `v1/register.go`: Group/version registration."
}

  "text": "The Kubernetes API server audit logging system is implemented across several packages in the kubernetes/kubernetes repo (under staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver).\n\n**Audit Event Creation from Requests:**\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/request.go`: Core logic to construct audit.Event structs from HTTP requests and responses (NewEventFromRequest, LogRequestObject, LogResponseObject, LogResponseStatus).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/context.go`: Stores and retrieves the audit event in/from the request context (WithAuditContext, AuditEventFrom).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/format.go`: Serializes audit events for output.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/audit.go`: HTTP middleware (WithAudit) that wraps handlers to create/complete audit events per request.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/audit_init.go`: Initializes audit context for each request (WithAuditInit).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/authn_audit.go`: Records authentication failure events (WithFailedAuthenticationAudit).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/audit.go`: Injects audit annotations from admission handlers.\n\n**Audit Policy Evaluation:**\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/evaluator.go`: Defines the PolicyRuleEvaluator interface and RequestAuditConfig struct.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/checker.go`: Implements PolicyChecker / NewPolicyRuleEvaluator that evaluates rules per request.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/reader.go`: Loads audit policy from a file (LoadPolicyFromFile).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/util.go`: Utility helpers for policy evaluation.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/validation/validation.go`: Validates audit policy objects.\n\n**Audit Backend Dispatch (log file vs webhook):**\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/types.go`: Defines the Backend interface that all backends implement.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/union.go`: Multiplexes events to multiple backends (Union).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/log/backend.go`: File/stdout log backend implementation.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/webhook/webhook.go`: Webhook (HTTP POST) backend.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/buffered/buffered.go`: Buffered async wrapper around any backend.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/fake/fake.go`: In-memory fake backend for testing.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/audit.go`: Server options wiring — reads flags and constructs the final backend chain.\n\n**Audit Truncation for Large Bodies:**\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/truncate/truncate.go`: Wraps another backend and truncates oversized request/response objects before forwarding (truncateBackend, NewBackend).\n\n**Audit API Types:**\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/types.go`: Internal type definitions (Event, Policy, PolicyRule, etc.).\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/helpers.go`: Helper functions for audit types.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/v1/types.go`: Versioned v1 API types.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/v1/generated.pb.go`: Protobuf-generated code for v1 types.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/v1/zz_generated.conversion.go`: Auto-generated conversion between internal and v1 types.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/install/install.go`: Installs audit API types into the scheme.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/scheme.go`: Audit-specific codec/scheme setup.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/metrics.go`: Audit event drop and error metrics.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/register.go` and `v1/register.go`: Group/version registration."
}
